verdict: Excellent flow and rhythmic accuracy, but the middle section (75s-95s) suffers from extreme repetition and physical asymmetry due to anchoring.

issues.problem: The exact same 3-measure pattern (L-U-Hold D, R-U-Hold D, Jump LR-U-Hold D) repeats 5 times in a row. This lack of variation is monotonous and heavily anchors one foot to the Down panel, creating physical fatigue.
